description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading to a carport on the left side. The structure features a flat roof and is surrounded by lush, mature trees and landscaped greenery, providing privacy and shade. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or concrete, with large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front yard is open with a neatly maintained lawn, while the rear and sides are more densely vegetated. A single orange car is parked in the driveway, adding a pop of color to the scene. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light exterior, large windows, and lush landscaping, featuring a driveway and carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, orange car, main entrance, and open lawn with trees framing the property.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the carport, side windows, and the driveway extending from the street.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by dense trees, with glimpses of the back facade and roofline.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the side entrance, additional windows, and landscaped greenery along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
